name: Lake
passiveDesc: When Lake's is in the team, all team members' DoT DMG taken is reduced by 40%.
rTalentDesc: Lake's Normal and Charged Attacks generate 1 Flux.

talent1.name: Polymetric Combustion
talent1.desc: Lake can trigger Polymetric Combustion. When Lake is in the team, Polymetric Combustion DMG is elevated by 3%.

normalAttackDesc: Lake deals 33 (+63% Physical ATK) as Physical DMG to the opponent.
chargedAttackDesc: Lake charges the ground and creates a Large Amethyst Cluster, dealing 46 (+66% Physical ATK) as AoE Physical DMG to selected opponents.
normalSkillDesc: Lake creates an Amethyst Crystal at the selected opponent's location, dealing 188 (+81.2% Hybrid DEF) as Physical DMG and granting all team member an Amethyst Shield equal to 478 (+88% Hybrid DEF). Amethyst Resonance: The Amethyst Crystal will continuously deal 96 (+67% Magic PWR) as Magic DMG to the opponent. This DMG is considered DoT DMG. The Amethyst Crystal will be destroyed when all team members' Amethyst Shield are broken or after 6 Cycles, dealing 222 (+72% Hybrid DEF) as Physical DMG.
riftedSkillDesc: Lake converts the area into the Crystal Experiment Zone for 4 Cycles. Crystal Experiment Zone: All opponents inside the Zone will takes 40% more DoT DMG and their SPD are reduced by 20%. Additionally, for every 200 Hybrid DEF, DoT DMG taken by opponents is increased further by 4%, up to 40%.
fragment1Desc: When Lake's Charged Attack "Amethyst Cluster" hits an Ametyst Crystal, the Crystal will explode immediately, dealing 500% of the original DMG as AoE Physical DMG. This attack will generate 3 Flux and can be triggered only once every 3 Cycles.
fragment2Desc: Amethyst Resonance DMG is increased by 60% of Lake's Hybrid DEF. When Lake's Normal and Charged Attacks hit an Amethyst Crystal, the Crystal will trigger Amethyst Resonance immediately.
fragment3Desc: "Crystal Experiment Zone" level is increased by 3.
fragment4Desc: When an Amethyst Crystal breaks, heals all team members by 300% of Lake's Hybrid DEF. This effect can be triggered once every 3 Cycles.
fragment6Desc: The duration of DoT effects will be halted while inside the Crystal Experiment Zone.
